_comment: Copy this to ~/.claude/wa-registry.json and fill in your own values. That file is read by /pull, /push, and /grab to resolve human-readable aliases to WhatsApp ids. It stays on your machine and is never committed.

provider._note_type: The reference adapter is 'periskope'. Any provider that exposes list-messages and send-message can be wired the same way (see plugins/pull/skills/pull.md, section 'Wiring a new provider'). The logic in these skills is provider-agnostic; the provider is yours to choose.
provider._note_org_phone: The number your provider account sends from. Recipients see this number's saved name. Digits only, country code, no +.
provider._note_sender_phone: Used as the x-phone header (Periskope) when reading. The provider only returns messages this number participated in. Pick the number that is actually in the chats you read. See the x-phone gotcha in pull.md.

me.note: Your own DM. Useful as a notes-to-self / notification target.

team.style: concise, fact-based, lead with the outcome
team.note: A group chat. Group ids end in @g.us.

teammate.note: A one-to-one chat. DM ids end in @c.us.

inference._comment: Optional. When /pull or /push is invoked without an explicit target, the skill scores known targets against the current conversation. Add keyword hints here to bias resolution.

sender_resolution._comment: Optional. Maps a sender id to a display name for readable /pull output. Without an entry, the raw id is shown.
